events.title: OSHO Meditation Camp
events.description: 3-day transformative OSHO meditation camp guided by certified facilitator
events.full_text:
3 Days OSHO Meditation Camp
11th 4pm - 14th 4pm
Tiruvannamali

Experience a transformative 3-day OSHO meditation camp, starting on 9th oct. Guided by certified facilitator Moksha, this retreat offers a deep meditative experience.
